name: Bill Hagerty
subject: Standing With President Trump
body:
Peter,Today, I joined Senator Marsha Blackburn in [opposing the certification of the Electoral College](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xuyurlt-fuutjhhtj-r/).We must restore trust and confidence in our election system, it's critical to our republic.I'll continue to support President Trump's efforts to bring much-needed transparency to our election system and fight against the travesty that was created by mid-game changes to the rules that went beyond the law.

Best, Bill Hagerty
U.S. Senator-elect, Tennessee | [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xuyurlt-fuutjhhtj-y/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xuyurlt-fuutjhhtj-j/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xuyurlt-fuutjhhtj-t/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xuyurlt-fuutjhhtj-i/)

| | Friends,

Today I will be sworn in as a member of the 117th Congress in the U.S. House of Representatives. I am deeply humbled by the faith you have put in me to represent the Big First. I will work hard to bring Kansas common sense to Washington each and every day.

Please join us [this afternoon](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=a6edfcf783&e=a9d1410029) for the swearing-in ceremony. The ceremony is expected to take place between 3:00PM and 5:00PM (EST).

I vow to advocate for agriculture, our Kansas conservative values, and to be your voice in our Nation's Capital.

Tracey

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Thank you for all you have done!
body:
| | Peter, Happy New Year! Thank you for your tremendous support of My Faith Votes. **You have faithfully prayed, given of your resources, and volunteered your time. You are truly making a difference in our nation!** In the last week of December, you helped us surpass our year-end fundraising goal. As a 100% donor-funded non-profit, your generosity is what makes My Faith Votes run. You are making it possible for us to mobilize Christians to vote in Georgia's critical runoff elections but you are also partnering with us as we prepare to face new challenges in Washington D.C. that could threaten biblical values. And, while many of you gave financially, thousands of you have graciously given of your time. Before the November elections and the Georgia runoff elections, more than 5,000 patriots stepped up to the plate and sent over 1.4 million postcards and handwritten letters to Christian voters in swing states and Georgia. You prayed over each voter by name and wrote a personal note to them. **The time and energy you spent on our national postcard campaign is unbelievable. Collectively, My Faith Votes volunteers sent over one million postcards and letters to Georgia alone!** We have heard from many people who were touched and moved by the postcard they received from a fellow believer praying for them and sharing voting information. The impact of this effort is exponential and will be more than we could ever measure. To see just a glimpse of this remarkable volunteer effort, **[please watch this short video](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ialYcXT_zXlvb_7Pz58ha2yr1eMYm5rCCUhokX6jZCQmcgcDK2R0l06s83-GV5reow&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e210103com01&n=1).** The images will move you and are sure to remind you that you are not alone. You’re part of a movement of Christians turning their faith into action to reach others. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ialYcXT_zXlvb_7Pz58ha2yr1eMYm5rCCUhokX6jZCQmcgcDK2R0l06s83-GV5reow&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e210103com01&n=2) From me and all of our team at My Faith Votes, we want to thank you for partnering with us in our mission to help Christians stand for God in our communities, states, and nation. We wish you and your family a Happy New Year! And we hope you are ready to continue working with us as we stand boldly and courageously for biblical truth. **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e210103com01&n=3)
---

| | Friends-

An American Dream turned into reality today when I took the oath of office to serve as the U.S. Representative for New York’s 11th Congressional District.

My parents came to this country as poor immigrants in search of opportunity and freedom. Today they witnessed their daughter being sworn in to represent the community we love in Congress. That is the American Dream we must work to preserve for future generations.

# **Perdue on Sunday Morning Futures:
"We’re Going to Get Out Our Vote Tuesday...We Can Win Georgia and Save America"**
| |
_"T he only thing left for the President is for us to object, and I agreed that I would do that...This is something that the American people demand right now."_
---
|

Senator David Perdue joined Maria Bartiromo on Fox News' _Sunday Morning Futures_ today to discuss the final countdown to Election Day, the campaign's efforts to protect the integrity of Tuesday's election and Jon Ossoff's evolving China scandal.

Click [here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=6416400483&e=02cd889ad3) or below to watch the full segment.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=a1d6125da4&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| **HIGHLIGHTS**
**
On His Calls for Colleagues to Object to the Certification of the 2020 Elections**

_"When I first saw the magnitude of the irregularities back in December about our November race, I called for the resignation of our Secretary of State. I repeatedly called for a special session of the General Assembly to investigate. None of that happened and so I started calling out, so the only thing left for the President is for us to object, and I agreed that I would do that. The technical problem is that I won't be certified until this election is certified, some week to 10 days after the election, when we win on Tuesday, but I'm encouraging my colleagues to object. This is something that the American people demand right now."_

**On Preparations for Election Day**

_"We've doubled the number of poll workers. We've got cameras and people watching all the drop boxes. We're doing everything we can on the absentee ballots and on Election Day counting to make sure what happened in November doesn't happen. But Maria, the big issue here is there are still Republicans that are upset and mad about what happened in November, as I am. Look, I don't think I would be in this runoff if everything had happened the way it should have in November, but the only recourse we have is to get out and fight, and rise up and vote on January 5, this coming Tuesday, so that's the only recourse we have now."_

**On Ossoff's Evolving China Scandal **

_"Well this evolving scandal with Jon Ossoff is becoming more and more clear: the Chinese Communist Party has identified young ambitious people in America to try to influence. You see the Eric Swalwell crisis right now, you see the Hunter Biden scandal, and now we see the evolving Jon Ossoff problem that he has with China. He was paid by them for two years. He's been encouraging people to follow the Chinese propaganda...He was asked this week on Fox News what he thought about it and he accused the reporter of being a serious journalist and [said he] shouldn't ask the question. He's never answered the question about his relationship with the CCP, Maria."_

**On the State of the Race**

_"I expect a big win. We're going to get our vote out on Tuesday. We know this is the last line of defense. We know that Jon Ossoff and Raphael Warnock will be nothing but a rubber stamp for Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi and the radical socialist agenda... We've got to hold the line in this election Tuesday and it's in our hands. It's in Republican conservative hands, Maria. If we get out and vote and fight for America we can win Georgia and save America that's what's at stake Tuesday."_

clean_body: | | | | | | Perdue on Sunday Morning Futures: "We’re Going to Get Out Our Vote Tuesday...We Can Win Georgia and Save America" | | "T he only thing left for the President is for us to object, and I agreed that I would do that...This is something that the American people demand right now." | Senator David Perdue joined Maria Bartiromo on Fox News' Sunday Morning Futures today to discuss the final countdown to Election Day, the campaign's efforts to protect the integrity of Tuesday's election and Jon Ossoff's evolving China scandal. Click or below to watch the full segment. | | | HIGHLIGHTS On His Calls for Colleagues to Object to the Certification of the 2020 Elections "When I first saw the magnitude of the irregularities back in December about our November race, I called for the resignation of our Secretary of State. I repeatedly called for a special session of the General Assembly to investigate. None of that happened and so I started calling out, so the only thing left for the President is for us to object, and I agreed that I would do that. The technical problem is that I won't be certified until this election is certified, some week to 10 days after the election, when we win on Tuesday, but I'm encouraging my colleagues to object. This is something that the American people demand right now." On Preparations for Election Day "We've doubled the number of poll workers. We've got cameras and people watching all the drop boxes. We're doing everything we can on the absentee ballots and on Election Day counting to make sure what happened in November doesn't happen. But Maria, the big issue here is there are still Republicans that are upset and mad about what happened in November, as I am. Look, I don't think I would be in this runoff if everything had happened the way it should have in November, but the only recourse we have is to get out and fight, and rise up and vote on January 5, this coming Tuesday, so that's the only recourse we have now." On Ossoff's Evolving China Scandal "Well this evolving scandal with Jon Ossoff is becoming more and more clear: the Chinese Communist Party has identified young ambitious people in America to try to influence. You see the Eric Swalwell crisis right now, you see the Hunter Biden scandal, and now we see the evolving Jon Ossoff problem that he has with China. He was paid by them for two years. He's been encouraging people to follow the Chinese propaganda...He was asked this week on Fox News what he thought about it and he accused the reporter of being a serious journalist and [said he] shouldn't ask the question. He's never answered the question about his relationship with the CCP, Maria." On the State of the Race "I expect a big win. We're going to get our vote out on Tuesday. We know this is the last line of defense. We know that Jon Ossoff and Raphael Warnock will be nothing but a rubber stamp for Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi and the radical socialist agenda... We've got to hold the line in this election Tuesday and it's in our hands. It's in Republican conservative hands, Maria. If we get out and vote and fight for America we can win Georgia and save America that's what's at stake Tuesday." | | "DONATE NOW!" | "VOLUNTEER" | | Join us at PerdueSenate.com and make this the largest grassroots effort in Georgia history to re-elect Senators David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © Perdue For Senate, All rights reserved. Peter \-- **Happy New Year! Are you ready to make 2021 a better year than last year by FINALLY Ending Walz' Emergency Powers?!** Even the [Star Tribune is noticing the vote](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=njZW7APv9ZjWe_0fvGjiu0vP9qIewafPqdEQ75_ENPYmSsAad8vDb6DLn1MPyQIjIdPL_Hxw582rFQD5OgyH8qH8p--6blPJOcQ3L_kGnGCaRNOQyPZm027kCUqVIICYwqKI4k9l4UZTU49PdJDnzbgKigey_hIXBoyBRhblUxnH9PiqdxPGVq20ZVGE3qLK&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vote_on_tuesday&n=2) is close. And your effort to contact the Democrat targets is working! Look at the words from one of the targets himself... "On a call with a reporter, [Representative] Ecklund said he had missed three calls in a matter of minutes and assumed they were all about Walz's emergency powers." **We have already submitted billboards to make sure every voter in these districts knows how their legislator is voting. And we have lined up digital ads, print ads, call campaigns and much more. Legislators like Ecklund have two options: vote the right way and End Walz' Emergency Powers or start to see the pain from our massive pressure campaign.** There's no doubt that Walz is starting to get nervous. He's making calls to his buddies at the Capitol pleading for them to protect him. We expect Speaker Hortman to play games against us, but we're ready to fire back. **What these Democrats don't understand yet, is that we are NOT going to quit. This is a MUST WIN issue!** If we fail, our beloved businesses who are under assault from Tyrant Walz and the radical Attorney General, Keith Ellison, will likely fail and go bankrupt. And the liberties we are losing everyday that this lockdown continues, will be lost for good. The stakes are incredibly high! Did you see that Keith Ellison threatened to put Larvita in a [county workhouse or work farm](https://www.action4liberty.com/ag_keith_ellison_wants_to_enslave_restaurant_owner_larvita?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vote_on_tuesday&n=3) if she doesn't close her doors? That's right. Walz and Ellison will literally take a single mother away from her children, just to enforce his illegal orders! **It's critical that we contact these politicians: Reps Paul Marquart, Julie Sandstede, Dave Lislegard and Rob Ecklund**.
## WE ONLY NEED 4 DEMOCRATS IN ORDER TO END WALZ' EMERGENCY POWERS!
Remind them that Governor Walz' illegal and immoral lockdown is harming Minnesota. The legislature MUST strip him of his powers immediately to stop the pain. **But the path to victory will not be easy.** Speaker Hortman and Democrat cronies will try to **Kill the Resolution** first. Then they'll pull procedural moves to **Avoid Hearing it** on the House floor. If those fail, they will solicit the help of the Republican establishment to **Water it Down** so Walz still has powers. And together they will do what they need to **Black Out** the vote. As you and I are reaching out to these Democrats, so is Governor Tim Walz. He's getting nervous that his powers are going to be eliminated - he won't go down without a fight. Democrats are going to do their best to **Kill the Resolution** to End Walz' Emergency Powers. However, angry voters are more powerful than anything Walz can promise them (campaign funds, committee assignments, etc). So your calls and emails are key! **If they can't kill the bill, Democrat leaders will try to avoid an actual vote by using parliamentary procedures. Tell these Democrat targets that they MUST stand up against Democrat leadership so we get a clean vote on Ending Walz' Emergency Powers.** When killing and avoiding doesn't work, Democrat, and even Republican leadership, will start watering down the Resolution. We're starting to hear that weak-kneed Republicans are preparing to cut backroom deals with the Democrats on a Fake End Walz' Powers bill. It's bad enough that the Republicans in Washington D.C. just sold us out - massive stimulus bill with billions of dollars going overseas - we can't let them make deals with Democrats in St Paul. Tell these Democrat targets that we DEMAND a clean vote on the End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution. No compromise! And if you have a Republican Rep, make sure he or she only supports a clean vote on Ending Walz' Emergency Powers. Lastly, the political establishment will try to **BLACK OUT** the vote by avoiding a roll call. House rules require 15 members to raise their hands in order to get a recorded vote. When politicians don't want to be held accountable, they avoid roll call votes so nothing is shown on the record. We MUST DEMAND a roll call vote on every single procedural move. **To recap, on January 5th when the Legislature convenes, we DEMAND a clean vote on the End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution. No gimmicks, no fake bills, no refusal to obtain a roll call vote. It's time everyone is on board to finally end the pain.** Please do me a favor. Please take 10 minutes out of your day to call, text or write these Democrat targets. Democrat Reps Gene Pelowski and Mike Sundin have already told their constituents that they'll vote the right way (we'll be watching to make sure they do!). So we need you to contact these four other Democrats immediately:
### **Rep Paul Marquart - 701-371-1949 -[pmarquart@hotmail.com](mailto:pmarquart@hotmail.com)******
### **Rep Julie Sandstede - 218-969-7009 -[julie4house@gmail.com](mailto:julie4house@gmail.com)**
### **Rep Dave Lislegard - 218-343-7965 -[davefor6b@gmail.com](mailto:davefor6b@gmail.com)**
### **Rep Rob Ecklund - 218-341-6133 -[randjecklund@yahoo.com](mailto:randjecklund@yahoo.com) **
## Fill up their inboxes and phone lines with this message:
Script: Rep _______, you have an important job this week. Minnesotans are suffering from record levels of depression and suicide. And every day, we hear about a new business going under. All of this is happening because one man believes he knows better than the rest of Minnesota. Do what is right and vote to End Walz' Emergency Powers immediately. Return lawmaking to the Legislature where it belongs. And don't let House Leadership block the vote through procedural moves. Alternate Script: Rep ________, you've voted to End Walz' Emergency Powers in the past. I'm so happy you were willing to place your voters & constituents needs ahead of your Party's Governor. But I hear you might not vote the same way now that there's actually a chance of the End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution passing. Please tell me this is not true. Minnesotans need you to stand for our liberty and for what's right. Vote to End Walz' Emergency Powers this week! Don't let Speaker Hortman derail an actual vote on this important issue. **Looking for more ways to help? Help us ramp up the pressure for this and other votes. Even if we lose the first time, we'll be right back at it, but with even more pressure![A donation of $100 can influence thousands of angry voters in our targets' districts. Even $50 or $25 can go a long way to helping us win this battle](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vote_on_tuesday&n=4)!** **In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Virginia special election on Tuesday, January 5th -- please vote!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek, Did you know that there is a special election this week on Tuesday, January 5th for Virginia's 2nd District in the House of Delegates?

The district includes parts of Prince William and Stafford counties. If you're registered there, please make sure to VOTE on January 5th.

**Here 's why this special election is important:** Virginians have worked so hard to flip the General Assembly blue, and Republicans are looking for every chance to take back our gains and roll back the meaningful progress we've made since the historic 2019 elections. **Every vote in this special election is going to be critically important to protecting progress.** **Candi King **is the Democratic nominee for State Delegate in District 2. Candi is a parent advocate for children with special needs, and I know she has what it takes to push for important issues like paid family leave and funding for public schools. I couldn't be prouder to support her -- I hope you'll join me. **How to vote:** Election Day is this coming Tuesday, January 5th, and you can vote at your usual polling location -- [**click here to find it**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1721/3e0906/78198b7d/3e30390c/3540834026/VEsH/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/Lookup/polling?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+click+here+to+find+it&utm_campaign=20210103_GOTV_TK_VA_King&source=20210103_GOTV_TK_VA_King"). Polls will be open from 6:00 AM until 7:00 PM and as long as you're in line by 7 PM, you will be able to vote. If you have any questions about voting, you can call the Virginia Democrats voter hotline at 844-4VA-VOTE. Let's keep pushing and make sure our great Democrats win these important special elections here in Virginia. Thanks for being a voter,

Tim Kaine

---
